items.name_en: 【be alma Handbag】 m12996 Monogram Black Leather
items.name_cn:
【be alma Handbag】 m12996 Monogram Black Leather
The be alma handbag blends the brand's iconic Alma handbag and makeup pouch designs, playing with urban travel style in the 2025 Cruise early spring collection. The compact structure features a woven chain strap, serving as a clutch or worn crossbody with a long shoulder strap.
Size: 15 x 7 x 27 cm

items.name_en: 【Black Paris💯 3-Grid Embroidery Lady Dior】The Lady Dior embroidered bag features a fashionable and soft "CHRISTIAN DIOR" logo. Adorned with the iconic "D.I.O.R." charm, adding a touch of liveliness to the exquisite silhouette. Equipped with a large detachable double-sided embroidered shoulder strap for versatile carrying options. Detachable double-sided wide strap, internal zip pocket and patch pocket. Can be carried by hand, over the shoulder, or crossbody, easily paired with other embroidered straps.

It comes with a large detachable double-sided embroidered shoulder strap, allowing you to choose your carrying style freely. The detachable double-sided embroidered wide strap, internal zip pocket, and patch pocket allow it to be carried by hand, over the shoulder, or crossbody, easily paired with other embroidered straps.

items.name_cn:
【Blue Round Label ❤ Medium】
Dior book tote shopping bag
This Book Tote bag, inspired by Creative Director Maria Grazia Chiuri, is a flagship product reflecting Dior aesthetics. It holds daily essentials and features a new interpretation of the Bayadere pattern mixed with D-Stripes embroidery for a more stylish look. The front is adorned with a "Christian Dior" logo, fully demonstrating Dior's exquisite craftsmanship.
Model: 1286
Size: 36×28 cm

Dior Mini Book tote

items.name_cn:
【BRAZZA Card Case Organizer】M62665 66540 Black Flower (Vintage)
This "Card Case Organizer De Posh" features Blush Monogram cowhide with faded Monogram patterns and used Patina (shadows). The texture reminiscent of weathered leather saddles highlights a minimalist beauty. Easily fits into a coat pocket. Holds coins, credit cards, and bills.
Size: 19x10 cm
